BOOTCAMP

Team Training · Group Coaching
★★★★★ 5.0 on Google · 500+ reviews
AUSactive Registered
First Aid & CPR Certified
Fully Insured
The Program

HIGH-ENERGY GROUP COACHING THAT ACTUALLY WORKS.

Bootcamp is the heartbeat of Knight Fitness. Coach-led group sessions built to get you fitter, stronger, and more consistent — without the guesswork of training alone.

Every session has a coach in the room programming, demonstrating, scaling, and pushing the energy. You'll move through structured strength, conditioning, and mobility work alongside a crew of locals who'll quickly start noticing when you're not there. That's the magic — accountability you don't have to manufacture yourself.

Session Length
45 MIN
Warm-up, train, cool-down
Group Size
UP TO 15
Coach-led every minute
Best For
ALL LEVELS
Fully scalable
Who It's For

BUILT FOR REAL PEOPLE.

  • Anyone who wants results without a personal-trainer price tag
  • Beginners who need structure and someone to actually teach them
  • Experienced lifters who want energy, accountability and community
  • Busy parents, shift workers, and tradies — multiple times daily
  • Anyone returning to training after a long layoff
What You Get

EVERYTHING TO MAKE IT STICK.

  • Coach-led every single session — no algorithm-spat workouts
  • Structured weekly programming for real progress
  • Strength, conditioning and mobility in every block
  • Nutrition guidance to back up the training
  • A community of locals training right next to you
The Knight Fitness Crew

YOU VERSUS YESTERDAY —
EVERY SINGLE SESSION.

No mirrors and headphones. Just a room full of locals who show up, work hard, and drag each other a little further every day. Come find your crew.

Is This Really For Me?

READ THESE OUT LOUD. IF EVEN ONE LANDS, YOU BELONG HERE.

✓
You want results without paying personal-trainer prices.
✓
You've started and stopped training more times than you can count.
✓
You'd rather a coach watching your form than guess your way through a workout.
✓
You want energy and accountability — not headphones and a mirror.
✓
Mornings, lunchtimes, or evenings need to fit around real life.
✓
You're a total beginner — or you've trained for years. Both belong here.

Still unsure? Getting in touch is exactly how you find out. No pressure, no contract — just come and try a session.

Session Types

EIGHT SESSION STYLES. NEVER THE SAME WEEK TWICE.

Our weekly timetable rotates through eight distinct session styles — so your body keeps adapting, your training stays fun, and you build a complete level of fitness instead of grinding the same workout over and over.

Strength & Conditioning

Classic S&C — get stronger under the bar, fitter under load. Compound lifts paired with smart conditioning so you build muscle and burn fat in the same session.

Fusion

A blend of strength, cardio and core in one flowing session. Variety that keeps the body guessing and the brain switched on — never the same workout twice.

Tough Enough

Our hardest session of the week. Higher intensity, longer engine work, properly scaled — the one you'll be glad you survived when you walk out the door.

Coaches Choice

Your coach pulls together the best of everything they know works. Could be partner work, a benchmark, or something brand new — always a great session.

Stretch & Recovery

Mobility, breathwork, and guided stretching to undo the desk, the kids, and the heavy weeks. Train hard, recover smart — the session most people skip and shouldn't.

Plyo Jam

Move to the beat, burn calories, and actually enjoy it. Simple dance combos mixed with athletic drills — keep it low-impact or explode into the plyo moves when you're ready.

Boxing

Pads, combos, footwork and conditioning rounds. The most fun way to torch calories, sharpen coordination and leave every bit of stress on the gym floor.

Warrior Circuit

Pure circuit training — multiple stations, short work intervals, minimal rest. Move station to station as a crew, hitting every muscle group and your engine all at once.

Coached, Not Supervised

EYES ON EVERY REP.

There's always a coach in the room — cueing your technique, loading the bar to the right weight for you today, and pushing you exactly as hard as you need. You're never left to guess, and you're never just a number on a leaderboard.

What Bootcamp Is NOT

LET'S CLEAR UP A FEW MISCONCEPTIONS.

✕
Not A Punishment Workout
We don't measure success in spew buckets or shame. Hard work, yes. Suffering for its own sake, never.
✕
Not The Army
No yelling. No humiliation. No "mate I'm trying to break you." Just real coaching from people who want you to win.
✕
Not Random Sweat
Every session is programmed. Tuesday looks different to Wednesday because it's a plan — not a guess.
Real Bootcamp Members

WHAT PEOPLE TRAINING IN THE ROOM RIGHT NOW ACTUALLY SAY.

Pulled straight from Google reviews — every word from someone who walks through the door each week.

★★★★★

"The bootcamp energy is contagious. I look forward to my 5:40am sessions which is something I never thought I'd say."

OT
Olivia Tanner
Bootcamp · 5 weeks ago
★★★★★

"Best investment I've made in my health. The bootcamp sessions are tough but so worth it. Down 9kg already."

MB
Michael Brown
Bootcamp · 3 weeks ago
★★★★★

"The 5:40am Bootcamp crew has become my anchor. I've lost the weight, my anxiety is dramatically better, and I have energy I haven't felt since my twenties."

YC
Yasmin Cordeiro
Bootcamp · 2 months ago
★★★★★

"Over 500 classes in 4 years and I finally reached my goal weight. I genuinely couldn't have done it without the coaches — they truly have your best interests at heart."

BC
Bec Casey
Bootcamp · 4 years training
★★★★★

"It's so much more than a gym. The atmosphere inside these walls is genuinely encouraging, friendly and supportive — I feel incredibly lucky to be part of the Knight community."

FG
Felisa Golingi
Bootcamp · Google Review
★★★★★

"Nearly 3 years in and I couldn't imagine training anywhere else. Everyone's supportive and genuinely wants to see each other succeed. The trainers are knowledgeable and motivating."

FT

Bootcamp · 3 years training
The Crew

YOU'LL FIT RIGHT IN.

Real members, real sessions. This is the crew you'll be training next to from day one.

When It Runs

A SESSION TO FIT EVERY SCHEDULE.

Multiple coached Bootcamp sessions every weekday, plus Saturday and Sunday mornings. The weekday times stay the same Monday to Friday, so it's easy to lock training into your routine.

Weekday Mornings
Monday – Friday
4:50am 5:40am 6:30am 7:30am 9:30am
7:30am runs Mon, Wed & Fri
Afternoons & Evenings
Monday – Friday
4:00pm 4:50pm 5:40pm 6:30pm
6:30pm runs Mon – Thu
Weekend
Saturday & Sunday
Sat 5:30am Sat 6:30am Sat 7:30am Sat 8:30am Sat 9:15am Sun 7:00am

View the full weekly timetable →

COME SEE THE GYM FOR YOURSELF.

45-minute sessions, coached start to finish. No contract, no pressure. Get in touch and we'll find you a time that suits.
